vllm.title: [New Model]mBART model
vllm.author: princepride
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR introduces support for the mBART model. This is a necessary prerequisite for the implementation of the Dolphin model, which is tracked in issue #18850, as Dolphin requires mBART for its decoder.
The main difference from the existing BART model is that mBART adjusts the position of th

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This fixes two places where the value set by the user was overwritten erroneously:


In _set_default_args_v1 the user specified value was overwritten by max_model_len

vllm.title: [Flaky CI] Increase timeout tolerance for test_mp_crash_detection+test_default_mm_lora_chat_completions
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose

Increase server startup timeout from 240s to 480s for test_default_mm_loras.py. The multimodal model with LoRA adapters requires additional time for initialization, especially under memory pressure. CI logs show the server was taking 253+ seconds to start, exceeding the default 240s timeout

vllm.title: [Bugfix] fix qwen3 moe fp8 accuracy issue
vllm.author: jinzhen-lin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix #22881 .
The origin issue is introduced by #22017 . The gate layer is initilized with fp8 quantization, but the origin weight is bf16.

vllm.title: [UX] Separate marlin moe config logic from triton moe
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
When using marlin moe, users would see warnings about using the default config with bad perf, but in most cases we use this default config since we don't have specific configs made for marlin. We should tune marlin separately so moving its default case out for now.
